name: python3-libregf
title: python3-libregf
summary: Windows NT Registry File (REGF) format access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
Windows NT Registry File (REGF) format access library -- Python 3 bindings
libregf is a library to access the Windows NT Registry File (REGF)
format.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libregf.
